# Feature Request Issue Template

GitHub issue template for proposing new Startup OS framework capabilities — standards, templates, prompts, or tooling. Not for company-specific product features; those belong in a company's own repository. Copy the body below into a new GitHub issue.

---

```markdown
## Problem

<What gap in the framework exists without this? Evidence, not assertion.>

## Proposed Solution

<What would be added or changed — at the framework level.>

## Business / Product Value

<Why this matters — for Startup OS itself, not any specific company.>

## Affected Domains

<Which docs/ domains are touched: e.g. 00-foundation, 04-ai, 10-templates.>

## Related Documents

- <capability / standard / template IDs this touches or extends>

## Dependencies

- <other work, decisions, or documents this depends on>

## Non-Goals

- <what this feature request explicitly does not cover>

## Acceptance Criteria

1. <verifiable statement>
2. <verifiable statement>

## AI Impact

<Does this change what AI agents should or must not do? Link docs/04-ai/ documents affected.>

## Documentation Impact

<Which documents must be created or updated for this feature to be considered done — per the documentation-before-development rule.>
```
